name: expert-panel
description: >- Score, evaluate, and iteratively improve any content or strategy using an auto-assembled panel of domain experts. Handles copy, sequences, landing pages, strategy docs, titles, charts, recruiting evaluations, or anything else that needs a quality gate. Recursively iterates until all scores hit 90+ (max 3 rounds). Use when asked to: "expert panel this", "score this", "rate these variants", "quality check this", "panel review", "which version is better", "expert score", "evaluate this copy/stra
author: ericosiu
summary_zh: 它能自动组建专家团给你的文案、策略等内容打分把关，并自动迭代优化直到分数达标，适合任何需要质量评估与改进的场景。
